creator: michael.glaus@hostpoint.ch
text:
(In reply to ruben from comment #23)
I think a downgrade is not necessary. In 3005.1 (and before) the port had a patch which removed the contextvars dependency.

Downgrading without the patch would probably lead to similar issues.
And instead of downgrading with the patch, the better solution would be adding the patch back to the current version. That way the package is up-to-date.
